docs_archived.reason: One-time planning analysis; implementation diverged from original framing; stay in raw
Evidence contract for POL-421 (not implemented in this cluster); not yet promotable to specs/active
One-time analysis doc; cluster plan executed, stays in raw

evidence_summary: POL-420 (children POL-422, POL-423) added the src/autoresearch/ route: an 8-gate binary scoring pipeline (scoreRun), a fix-zone proposal builder (buildProposals), and a Linear proposal router (routeProposals), all dev-gated via isPolarisDevContext(). The CLI surface was extended with polaris autoresearch score and polaris autoresearch propose subcommands in src/cli/autoresearch.ts. Both src/POLARIS.md and src/cli/POLARIS.md were updated to document the new route and file. Both SUMMARY.md files were refreshed to include the autoresearch command group in the current-state description. Three raw analysis docs (pol-424, pol-419, autoresearch-role-evidence-contract) were assessed and left in place as archived planning artifacts — none describe fully implemented behavior warranting promotion to specs/active. No cognition notes to archive. No links required repair. POL-421 (evidence contract expansion) was not in this cluster and remains open; the autoresearch-role-evidence-contract.md raw doc should be revisited when POL-421 completes.
